author: Marie-Laure Thuret
subject: refacto(SFFV): use withSearchBox and searchForItems (algolia/react-instantsearch#1922)
body:
* refacto(SFFV): use withSearchBox and searchForItems

DEPRECATED:
Before we were using only searchForFacetValues.
searchForFacetValues is now deprecated and would be remove in the future.

* Rename Search_for_facet_values.md to Searching_in_Lists.md

* Update Searching_in_Lists.md

* Update Searching_in_Lists.md

* Update connectMenu.js

* Update connectRefinementList.js

* Update Searching_in_Lists.md
